description: Dynamic dispatch (virtual / dyn Trait) over 1 mixed-shape array (heap-allocated polymorphic objects). Polymorphic-3 call site — measures vtable indirection + BTB miss + cache pointer chasing. No Vec/std::vector — raw heap arrays.

ioContract.fixtureLayout: N shapes × 24 B packed LE: [tag_u8, padding × 7, p1_f64, p2_f64]. tag ∈ {0=Circle, 1=Square, 2=Triangle}; p1 ∈ [0.5, 5.0); p2 ∈ [0.5, 5.0) for Triangle, else ignored.
ioContract.iterSemantics: Iter-dependent. expectedChecksum валиден только для N = innerIterations[size].
ioContract.stateModel: Read-only after loadInput. No reset companion needed.
ioContract.outputLayout: Single u64 checksum: floor(score · 1e6 + 0.5) sum mod 2^64; identical across 4 binaries для same shape data.
